seo.title: Contact Pearl Remote | Hire Remote Staff
seo.description: Contact Pearl Remote to book a strategy call, discuss your remote staffing needs, and start hiring vetted Filipino remote professionals.

hero.heading: Secure your top-tier global talent today.
hero.description: Skip the recruitment headache. Book a strategy call with our experts or fill out the form below to start building your remote team.

inquiry.heading: Tell us about your needs
inquiry.description: Share a few details about the roles you need to fill and our team will follow up with next steps.

fields.label: What do you need help with?
fields.name: message
fields.placeholder: Tell us about your hiring goals, timeline, and required skills.

details.heading: Prefer to talk first?
details.description: Book a strategy call and we will walk through the roles, timeline, and matching process with you.

items.label: Best for
items.value: Virtual assistants, support, admin, and operations roles

testimonial.quote: The process was seamless. I didn't have to waste time interviewing dozens of candidates. They just sent the best ones.
testimonial.author: Mark Thompson
